name: Investigar capacidades completas de Trifecta F1 + oracle y mejorar indexación para paper-writer

description: Full Trifecta F1 capability audit: 7 MCP tools discovered, 3 structural blockers identified, AST layer works on paper-writer

Extended GraphIndexer with configurable source_roots via trifecta_config.json. Paper-writer went from 0/0 to 98 nodes / 55 edges. Added 3 new tests. All 41 graph+oracle tests pass. Graph blocker resolved.

Fixed context_pack.json backward compat: ContextChunk auto-derives id/char_count/token_est from text, ContextPack auto-builds index from chunks and accepts old 'version' key. PRIME+Graph Oracle fully operational on paper-writer. Pre-existing test_build_context_pack failures confirmed unrelated.

Implemented real HybridDispatcher: MCP JSON-RPC over Unix socket to F1 daemon. Creates missing calibration_use_case and discovery_service stubs. Verified ctx_search, ctx_oracle, ctx_health via live daemon. 7 new unit tests for dispatcher. All 50 tests pass.

Extended query classifier with 4 new semantic patterns (definition of, type of, definición de, tipo de) to unlock LSP trigger. Wired LSP client into Oracle CLI path. Added did_open before hover in Oracle. LSP signal fully verified via ast hover (capability_state=FULL). Oracle LSP path gated by old pack source_path quality — pack uses virtual paths like "paper-writer/X" instead of real file paths. 50/50 tests pass.

Scaffolded minimal segment canon for paper-writer (skill.md, AGENTS.md, agent/prime/session _paper-writer.md). Extended BuildContextPackUseCase to read source_roots from config for pack generation. Fixed ContextService.search to use chunk.source_path instead of title_path_norm in SearchHit — now Python source files resolve correctly. Regenerated pack: 134 chunks (was 18). Oracle achieves fidelity=degraded with PRIME+AST+Graph fusion verified. LSP signal circuit complete but gated by pyright cold-start latency (215ms > 20ms budget). Increased LSP budget to 500ms.

Achieved fidelity=full in Oracle! Root cause: pyright returns None when hover character=0 (at keyword) but returns data when character lands on the identifier. Fixed by: (1) adding col_offset to SymbolInfo in AST parser, (2) shifting LSP hover position past "class " (6) or "def " (4) keyword to land on the symbol name. Verified: "what is OrchestratorDependencies" → fidelity=full with PRIME+AST+LSP hover returning class docstring. 50/50 tests pass.

Two-pass graph indexing with global symbol table for cross-file call resolution. Paper-writer: 98/55 nodes/edges → 106/78 (+23 cross-file edges). build_orchestrator_dependencies now has 12 callees across harness/ and integrations/. main()→Orchestrator cross-file edge visible via Oracle. 53 tests pass (3 new cross-file tests). No overfitting: same-file tests unchanged, new tests verify new capability only.

Method-level graph indexing: AST parser extracts class methods (kind=method/init) with qualified_name like Orchestrator.execute. Graph indexer tracks self.method() intra-class calls and method→function cross-kind edges. _DirectCallCollector detects self.attr() patterns. Paper-writer: 106→230 nodes (+124 methods), 78→167 edges (+89 method edges). Orchestrator internal call chain now visible: execute→_run_gate_verification→_run_wrapper_gate→_build_wrapper_artifacts. StateManager.set_gate→load_state,save_state. 3 new unit tests, 55 total pass.

Context-aware graph disambiguation: Oracle uses PRIME hit file paths to prefer graph candidates from the same context directory. When ambiguous target (e.g., 'execute' in both Orchestrator and SkillAdapter) has multiple candidates, and the first yields 0 results, falls through to the next candidate. Also uses qualified_name (e.g., Orchestrator.execute) instead of symbol_name for node_id construction. Verified: 'callees of execute' correctly resolves to Orchestrator.execute (6 callees: _validate_preconditions, _run_gate_verification, _get_next_stage, _build_fail_result, ManuscriptState, OrchestratorResult). 2 new unit tests. 57 total pass.

Transitive graph queries via BFS traversal with configurable depth. Query classifier detects 4 new transitive patterns ('all callers of', 'depends on', 'dependencies of', 'everything X calls') → auto depth=3. GraphStore adds get_callers/callees_transitive with BFS. GraphService.callers/callees accept depth param. CLI adds --depth flag. Oracle wires depth from predicate through disambiguation path. Paper-writer: 'all callees of execute' returns 20 nodes (vs 6 direct), discovering full Orchestrator call chain: execute→_run_gate_verification→_run_wrapper_gate→_build_wrapper_artifacts; validate_repo_initialized→run_gate→Check, GateResult. 7 new unit tests (2 transitive graph, 5 classifier), 84 total pass.

Context-aware fidelity semantics: Oracle now reports fidelity correctly based on which signals were EXPECTED (from query classification), not which signals happened to fire. Relational-only queries ('callers of X') report full when graph+PRIME+AST succeed, because LSP is not applicable. Semantic queries ('what is X') report degraded when LSP fails. Plain search queries report fallback. Query classified once and reused across graph/LSP signal paths. Paper-writer: 'callees of execute' now fidelity=full (was degraded). 'what is OrchestratorDependencies' with LSP → full. 4 new fidelity unit tests, 88 total pass.

Import-level graph edges: file→file dependency tracking alongside function-level calls. _ImportCollector extracts 'import X' and 'from X import Y' statements. Module path resolution maps Python dotted names to project files. Module nodes (kind=module) created per file. GraphStore.get_importers/import_targets_for_node with parametric edge_kind filter. GraphService.importers/import_targets. CLI: 'graph importers'/'graph import-targets' subcommands. Paper-writer: 264 nodes (+34 modules), 209 edges (167 calls + 42 imports). Orchestrator→state, action_runner, artifact_checker, tool_wrapper dependencies now visible. 1 new unit test, 89 total pass.

Oracle now answers import-level dependency queries from natural language. Extended RelationalPredicate with importers/import_targets relation types. Added 6 query classifier patterns for import relations: 'files that import X' (importers), 'who imports X' (importers), 'modules that use X' (importers), 'what depends on X' (importers), 'imports of X' (import_targets), 'what does X import' (import_targets). Oracle graph signal routes importers/import_targets to GraphService.importers/import_targets. Module node disambiguation: import queries prefer kind=module nodes over class/function nodes, preventing PRIME context from overriding. Fixed missing 'if predicate is None' guard on transitive caller patterns that caused import patterns to be overridden. Paper-writer: 'what does orchestrator import' returns 6 module imports (state, action_runner, artifact_checker, tool_wrapper, gates, state_manager). 'files that import orchestrator' returns cli/paper/main.py. 7 new tests, 95 total pass.

Inheritance edges: 3rd graph dimension alongside calls and imports. ClassDef.bases extracted from AST, resolved against global symbol table for cross-file inheritance. Paper-writer: 264 nodes, 219 edges (167 calls + 42 imports + 10 inherits). 7 ToolWrapper subclasses discovered (BibliographyNormalizer, PandocRenderer, RefsMetadataValidator, RefsValidator, ReportingAuditor, StyleLinter, ZoteroImporter). YamlFileStateRepository→StateRepository. GraphStore.get_subclasses/parents_for_node with edge_kind='inherits'. GraphService.subclasses/parents. CLI: graph subclasses/parents. 7 query classifier patterns for inheritance: 'subclasses of X', 'implementations of X', 'what extends X', 'who extends X', 'parents of X', 'what does X extend', 'what does X inherit from'. Oracle routes inheritance through graph signal. 7 new tests, 101 total pass.

Cycle detection: DFS three-color algorithm for calls/imports/inherits. GraphStore.detect_cycles uses white/gray/black DFS to find circular dependencies in any edge kind. GraphStore.find_node_by_id resolves node IDs to node info. GraphService.cycles with edge_kind parameter. CLI: 'trifecta graph cycles --kind calls|imports|inherits'. Paper-writer: 0 cycles across all 3 edge kinds — confirms clean architecture (no circular imports, no recursive calls, no inheritance cycles). Verified with synthetic 3-node cycle test (alpha→beta→gamma→alpha detected correctly) and acyclic test (0 cycles). 2 new unit tests, 103 total pass.
